summary: Planning from the hydrated preflight artifact only; no GitHub mutations are allowed in this job. #92275 remains the best open canonical issue for the reported native Codex account-scoped CODEX_HOME/cache growth, while #92298 is a related open fix PR but is not merge-ready because required real behavior proof failed and ClawSweeper review did not complete.

actions.reason: #92275 is the clearest surviving canonical report and still needs maintainer/fix validation rather than closure.
